data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for SMS providers.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the integration with SMS providers (Twilio, MessageBird). However, the provided evidence does not include any specific checks or confirmations regarding this functionality. As a result, it is not possible to determine if the requirement is satisfied or if there is a gap in the implementation.
gaps: No evidence of integration with SMS providers (Twilio, MessageBird) as required.
